shape_decode: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = W,_,W,L  -> cmplog and value_profile_cmplog RESOLVE, naive BLOCKS, value_profile NON-DECISIVE. Pure i2s-pro family: I2S (input-to-state substitution) is the resolving technique; the value-profile gradient adds nothing decisive.

hypotheses.label: I2S enriches the cmplog corpus with the exact CMP-target byte(s) at the gate offset (literal substitution), which naive's blind havoc cannot place

params.gate_target_value: per-branch W (CMP-target) byte(s) at the fixed gate offset
params.gate_decoy_value: per-branch L (loser-occupying) byte(s) at the same offset

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich > 0: the cmplog corpus is log2-enriched (vs naive) for the exact target byte value at the fixed gate offset. DISCRIMINATING because an i2s-pro literal-substitution mechanism deterministically plants the CMP operand at that one offset, so its corpus concentrates on the target value; a NON-i2s explanation (naive reaches it by coverage gradient, or the gate is not an I2S value gate) predicts signed_target_enrich ~ 0. G2-independent: enrichment is measured on the saved CORPUS bytes at the gate offset, not on which fuzzer resolved.

hypotheses.label: I2S repairs interdependent multi-field structure (ELF section table / PNG iTXt chunk grammar / XML scheme+attribute parse) so the winner corpus drives the gated loop/branch line DEEPER per seed than the loser, rather than flipping a single fixed-offset literal

params.branch_line: per-branch gate line (bloaty section_count loop guards; libpng tRNS/PLTE allocation + num_trans transparency lines)

hypotheses.prediction: depth_lift > 1 AND winner_deeper=true: the winner-resolving seeds execute the gated loop/branch line MORE per seed than the loser-blocking seeds, because I2S repaired enough of the surrounding multi-field structure for the parser to advance through it. DISCRIMINATING: a pure single-literal-substitution alternative flips the branch with EQUAL reach (depth_lift ~ 1); a STRUCTURAL-assembly mechanism predicts the winner reaches the gate region substantially deeper per seed. This also rules out operand_enrichment as the operative signal, since these gates have NO single fixed offset (operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature). G2-independent: depth_lift is a per-seed-normalized execution-count ratio at the branch line from llvm-cov, NOT from which fuzzer resolved.

hypotheses.label: I2S plants the exact multi-byte CMP operand literal SOMEWHERE in the cmplog corpus (at a variable / floating chunk offset), so the I2S arm's seeds reach Hamming-distance ~0 to the operand anywhere in the buffer while naive's blind-havoc corpus stalls far away -- the offset-agnostic reach signal that per-gate-offset byte-frequency (operand_enrichment) misses when the literal does not pin to one fixed offset

params.note: byte/string mode (not --numeric); width >= 3 so the value_distance_reached short-operand (width<=2) chance-alignment caveat does NOT apply

hypotheses.prediction: cmp_min_distance ~ 0 AND distance_gap > 0 AND winner_closer=true: the cmplog (I2S) corpus contains a seed whose sliding window matches the operand literal exactly (residual ~0), while naive's closest seed stays a measurable Hamming distance away. DISCRIMINATING and offset-agnostic, so it fires where operand_enrichment (per-gate-offset) returned ~0 because the literal floats across variable chunk positions; it asks whether the operand was REACHED at all, not how deeply the gated loop iterated, so it also fires where depth_reach (depth_lift) was ~1 (one-shot dispatch equality). A non-I2S alternative (naive lands the multi-byte literal by havoc) predicts naive_min_distance ~ 0 too (distance_gap ~ 0). G2-independent: value_distance_reached reads what each arm's saved seeds REACHED, never the resolve pattern.
hypotheses.rule: winner_closer == true AND distance_closure_ratio >= 0.5 AND cmp_min_distance <= 0.1

hypotheses.label: I2S enriches the cmplog corpus with the structural KEYWORD/FOURCC token (PNG chunk-type tag, XML namespace keyword, magic prefix) at a corpus-wide FREQUENCY that naive's blind havoc cannot sustain -- the fraction of the cmplog corpus carrying the token ANYWHERE in the buffer is much higher than naive's, a corpus-frequency statistic that survives where the per-seed minimum-Hamming reach test did not

params.match_mode: offset_agnostic_substring (count a corpus seed as token-bearing if the token appears at ANY offset; cmp_token_fraction = token-bearing seeds / corpus size, per fuzzer; token_enrich_log2 = log2(cmp_token_fraction / naive_token_fraction))

structural_token_per_branch.libxml2_6930: namespace keywords ['xmlns' (78 6d 6c 6e 73), 'xlink' (78 6c 69 6e 6b)] -- seed is token-bearing if it carries ANY listed keyword
structural_token_per_branch.libxml2_7250: XML prolog/namespace literals ['<?xml' (3c 3f 78 6d 6c), 'xmlns' (78 6d 6c 6e 73)] -- seed is token-bearing if it carries ANY listed literal

params.note: NEW descriptor (no built tool exposes a standalone cmplog-vs-naive corpus token-FREQUENCY; joint_necessity counts tokens but is hardwired to the vpc/cmplog/vp joint comparison, not cmplog-vs-naive, and reports per-seed median counts not a token-bearing fraction). All tokens width >= 3.

hypotheses.prediction: token_enrich_log2 >= 1.0 AND winner_token_enriched=true: a substantially larger FRACTION of the cmplog corpus carries the structural token (at any offset) than naive's corpus, because I2S keeps re-planting the logged FOURCC/keyword operand across the corpus while naive only retains the rare havoc-lucky seed. DISCRIMINATING and GENUINELY NEW vs the three prior tests for these branches: (a) it is a corpus-FRACTION statistic, not a per-seed MINIMUM -- so it fires where value_distance_reached scored rule_not_met because naive happened to retain ONE near-match seed (pulling naive_min_distance low and collapsing distance_gap) yet its corpus as a whole is NOT token-enriched; (b) it is offset-agnostic, so it fires where operand_enrichment (fixed per-gate-offset) diluted to ~0 because the token floats across chunk/element positions; (c) it asks about token PRESENCE frequency, not loop-iteration depth, so it fires where depth_reach was ~1 (one-shot dispatch / presence gates). The discriminating ALTERNATIVE it rules out: a non-I2S explanation (the token is common in BOTH corpora, e.g. naive reaches it by coverage or it is ambient) predicts token_enrich_log2 ~ 0. G2-independent: the metric is the fraction of each arm's SAVED corpus carrying the token, computed from corpus bytes, never from the resolve pattern that defined the shape.

data_realities_respected: No seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence 'I2S event' descriptor is proposed (I2S is untagged in mutation_op).

value_profile is treated as a non-decisive feedback for this shape (vp = '_'); no descriptor attributes a gradient mutation to it. value_distance_reached and the new token_count descriptor both use winner=cmplog (the I2S arm) vs loser=naive -- a valid I2S-corpus question, NOT a vp-gradient claim.

byte_freq_ratio (operand_enrichment) is applied ONLY to fixed-offset, byte-aligned value gates. Offset-floating multibyte literals are routed to value_distance_reached (per-seed min Hamming) and, where the corpus min collapses because one naive seed got lucky, to the NEW offset-agnostic token-FREQUENCY descriptor.

The new token_count descriptor is offset-agnostic substring presence over the saved corpus, so it respects the data_reality that byte-alignment fails on different-sized / variable-offset structural-assembly seeds.

ctx context-reach (naive_ctx, context-sensitive coverage) is INVISIBLE on the standard cov binary (data_reality: depth_reach is BLIND to it). Branches whose ONLY remaining competing winner story is a naive_ctx context-coverage effect are marked decidable:false, not force-labeled I2S.

Corpus/seed tools (operand_enrichment, value_distance_reached, the new token_count descriptor, depth_reach) score only targets whose corpus / cov image exists on the OWNING server (curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3 on s4; lcms/libxml2/libpng/bloaty on sB). Branches are NOT marked decidable:false for absent-on-s4 corpus; the owning server arbitrates its own targets.

notes.priors_kept: KEPT all three prior KEEP hypotheses VERBATIM in measurement, metrics, and rule: (1) i2s_fixed_offset_literal_substitution (operand_enrichment, signed_target_enrich >= 1.0), (2) i2s_structural_assembly_depth (depth_reach, depth_lift >= 1.5 AND winner_deeper), (3) i2s_operand_reached_offset_agnostic (value_distance_reached, winner_closer AND distance_closure_ratio >= 0.5 AND cmp_min_distance <= 0.1). The confirmed branches (37x fixed_offset + 6x assembly_depth + the value_distance member that held) re-validate against these unchanged rules. From i2s_operand_reached_offset_agnostic I retained only libpng_3820 (the member that previously held); the floating-literal members that scored rule_not_met under the per-seed MIN test (libpng_3887/3902/4051, libxml2_6359/6946/6976) are re-routed to the NEW corpus-FRACTION token test, which is a different statistic, not a relaxed threshold. The three prior rules are byte-for-byte untouched, so the monotonic/superset guarantee holds for every confirmed branch.
notes.new_mechanism: ADDED ONE genuinely-new hypothesis i2s_structural_token_corpus_enrichment with a NEW descriptor corpus_queue:token_count:structural_token:per_branch (orchestrator builds it; the brief flagged token_count as a not-yet-tried pivot). Mechanism: I2S re-plants the logged structural FOURCC/keyword operand (PLTE/tRNS/iTXt chunk tags; UTF-8 BOM; 'xml'/'xmlns'/'xlink'/'http://[' XML literals) across the cmplog corpus at FLOATING offsets, so a much larger FRACTION of the cmplog corpus carries the token anywhere in the buffer than naive's corpus. This is the discriminating statistic the three prior tools missed for these 8 branches: operand_enrichment (fixed per-gate-offset) diluted to ~0 because the token floats; value_distance_reached (per-seed MINIMUM Hamming) scored rule_not_met because naive retained ONE lucky near-match seed that collapsed distance_gap even though naive's corpus as a whole is not token-enriched; depth_reach was ~1 because these are one-shot dispatch/presence gates, not loops. A corpus token-bearing FRACTION ratio survives all three failure modes and is falsifiable + discriminating (G1: a non-I2S alternative -- token common in both corpora -- predicts token_enrich_log2 ~ 0). libxml2_6930 and 7250 (xmlFreeDoc/xmlTextReaderFreeDoc oldNs presence) carry a partial naive_ctx story too, but the token-enrichment question is still cleanly discriminating: it asks whether the cmplog corpus is enriched in the namespace keywords (a property of the I2S corpus, independent of whether ctx also helped), so they belong with this test rather than decidable:false.
notes.decidable_false_subgroup: Marked 10 branches decidable:false -- an honest inconclusive, NOT a forced label. Of the round-3 UNLABELED set, FIVE land here: (1) libpng_3892_h0 (single byte color_type 0x03 at fixed offset 0x19): operand_enrichment already scored rule_not_met and the only competing story is grimoire-anti -- I2S substitution of one byte is byte-for-byte indistinguishable from havoc/other landing the same byte; no built tool discriminates a width-1 fixed-offset gate beyond operand_enrichment, which was already tried and refuted. (2) libpng_4055_h0 and (3) libpng_4061_h0 (iTXt compression-info/flag single bytes): the member analyses carry a STRONG competing naive_ctx (context-sensitive coverage) winner story -- the resolving seeds are stored by naive_ctx -- and ctx context-reach is BLIND on the standard cov binary (data_reality), so I2S-byte vs ctx-coverage cannot be separated by any built tool; depth_reach already scored rule_not_met. (4) libxml2_6597_h1 (single byte tab 0x09 in comment body): same naive_ctx competitor + a width-1 operand -- non-discriminable. (5) libxml2_6205 (winner takes the ns != 'xmlns' FALSE side): there is NO operand literal to REACH or to ENRICH TOWARD (the winner AVOIDS 'xmlns'), so value_distance_reached and the token-enrichment test are both inapplicable, and a side-based depth signal would be tautological with the resolve pattern (G2 violation). The remaining decidable:false members (libpng_3965_h0, libxml2_6909, libxml2_7287, bloaty_87, bloaty_90) carry over from the prior round (single-byte / derived-integer / correlated-multifield gates with no clean discriminable per-branch signal; depth_reach and/or operand_enrichment already refuted). Honest inconclusive is the correct outcome; the fallback carries these 10.
notes.round3_routing_summary: Of the 13 round-3 UNLABELED branches: 8 -> NEW i2s_structural_token_corpus_enrichment (libpng_3887/3902/4051, libxml2_6359/6946/6976/6930/7250); 5 -> decidable:false (libpng_3892/4055/4061, libxml2_6597/6205). No prior rule was relaxed; the new mechanism is a distinct corpus-FRACTION statistic, and the decidable:false set is justified by exhausted/blind built tools (ctx-coverage invisibility, width-1 indistinguishability, false-side non-match with no operand to reach).
notes.scope_and_caveats: Decision order: operand_enrichment first (cheapest, fixed-offset literals), then value_distance_reached (per-seed min Hamming), then the new token-frequency descriptor (corpus-fraction substring scan, no Docker), then depth_reach (Docker-per-branch). The token_count and value_distance_reached descriptors score only on the owning server's on-disk corpora (libpng/libxml2 on sB); any member missing its corpus or seeds on the owning server falls to the inconclusive fallback automatically. The token rule pairs token_enrich_log2 >= 1.0 with a winner_token_enriched guard so an ambient/common token (enriched in neither arm differentially) does NOT produce a spurious label -- exactly the falsification condition (G1) that distinguishes I2S corpus-replanting from background presence.
